name: Seafood Coctail Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. Fresh or frozen peeled, cooked shrimp
1 medium avocado, halved, seeded, peeled, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish and shrimp if frozen; set aside.
2. For dressing, stir together salad dressing and cocktail sauce in a medium bowl. If necessary, stir in a little water to achieve the desired pouring consistency. Cover and chill until serving time.
3. In a large mixing bowl, toss shrimp and/or fish with avocado and 3 tablespoons of the dressing.
4. Arrange lettuce leaves on four dinner plates. Spoon seafood mixture onto each leaf. Arrange melon, orange slices, and berries around the seafood. Sprinkle with poppy seed.
5. Serve with remaining dressing. Makes 4 main-dish servings.
